description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of several rectangular volumes, some stacked and others extending horizontally, creating a dynamic and open layout. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The property includes a spacious driveway, a landscaped area with shrubs at the front, and a backyard with a pool and patio. The flat roof and open terraces further emphasize the contemporary architectural style. The use of concrete, glass, and wood elements is evident throughout the exterior.
description: A modern, minimalist house with white geometric volumes, large windows, flat roofs, a driveway, landscaped front, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated driveway, backyard pool, and open patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, and terrace with greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and landscaped shrubs
